all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
Therefore thus saith the Lord God of Israel, Behold, I am bringing such evil upon Jerusalem and Judah, that whosoever heareth of it, both his ears shall tingle.
2 Kings 21:12
Quote of the Day
"Because Jesus Christ conquered death, surely He can conquer any danger, confusion, or doubt we face."
President Dieter F. Uchtdorf | 1 Apr 2026General Conference
